title: Sade's Modpack
description: A modpack consisting of a bunch of vanilla+ mods that improve the content without changing the main structure of the game.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cee807458f2ed61a8b754f3a360fda674cf1f19b.png)

Sade's Modpack is designed to improve the Minecraft experience while keeping the original vanilla feeling intact.
Instead of completely changing the game, this modpack focuses on enhancing what already exists in Minecraft.

It adds quality of life improvements, better performance, atmospheric sounds, visual enhancements, and new building options — all without breaking the core gameplay that makes Minecraft special.

The goal of this modpack is simple:
**Make Minecraft feel better, smoother, and more immersive while still feeling like vanilla.**

## Features

• Vanilla-friendly gameplay improvements
• Better performance and optimization
• Immersive sounds and environmental effects
• Improved UI and quality of life features
• More building and decoration options
• Enhanced exploration with better world generation

---
